justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's initial time preference and subsequent requests for earlier/later slots on a specific day.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed alternative slots when the user's preferred time was unavailable, offering relevant options without being overwhelming.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered information and responded without any unnecessary turns or redundant questions.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent successfully booking the appointment and maintaining a helpful tone.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered gracefully when the initial time was unavailable, expanding the search intelligently and maintaining full context.
